architecture.summary: Create src/constants/npm-constants.ts with shared registry URL constant and helper function. Follows existing pattern from pricing-constants.ts. Update 4 production files and 3 test files to import from shared module.

integrations.summary: N/A - Internal refactor only, no external service integrations. npm registry URL is already used in production code, just being centralized.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI internals only, no UI changes.

performance.summary: N/A - String constant extraction has zero performance impact.

security.summary: N/A - No secrets or auth changes. Registry URL is a public constant.

edge-cases.summary: Primary edge case is the bug itself: TC-UH-02 mock missing --registry flag. Prevention via shared constants ensures test mocks cannot drift from production command strings. grep-based CI lint rule can catch future violations.
